articles.title: Robinhood Connect to allow access from external crypto wallets
articles.description: Robinhood announced on April 27 a new feature that will allow users to access the trading platform’s cryptocurrency features from external applications. The company’s official press release says that the feature will first be added to two crypto wallets — the Solana wallet Phantom and the multi-coin wallet Exodus. The feature will be extended to […]

articles.title: Polygon developers get access to Google Cloud’s node service
articles.description: Google Cloud has announced that its node hosting service, the Blockchain Node Engine, will be available for developers on the Polygon blockchain.

articles.title: Polkadot (DOT) Remains King Of Crypto Market In This Metric
articles.description: Data shows Polkadot (DOT) is still the number one cryptocurrency in the market regarding the project’s development activity. Polkadot Continues To Top The Development Activity Chart According to data from the on-chain analytics firm Santiment, besides Polkadot, the assets in the top three for this indicator are Kusama (KSM) and Cardano (ADA). The “development activity” […]

articles.title: Dymension and Evmos are testing an EVM rollup for the Cosmos ecosystem
articles.description: Dymension is working on the first IBC-enabled EVM-compatible Layer 2 rollup scaling solution that will integrate with the Cosmos ecosystem.

articles.title: Polygon Announces Launch of Bridge for Polygon zkEVM
articles.description: Polygon releases important functionality for zkEVM that could become next big chain in industry

articles.title: Coinbase Will Win Lawsuit Against SEC, Predicts Pro-XRP Lawyer – Here’s Why
articles.description: Attorney and XRP supporter John Deaton is optimistic that Coinbase will prevail in its lawsuit against the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). Deaton tells his 262,100 Twitter followers that the US crypto exchange will emerge victorious in the lawsuit seeking to compel the SEC to disclose whether it has accepted or denied a petition […]

articles.title: Investment giant Franklin Templeton connects US$270 million fund to Polygon network
articles.description: Franklin Templeton said Wednesday that its OnChain U.S. Government Money Fund is now supported on the Polygon network.

articles.title: Mad Lads Gave Solana NFTs a ‘New Heartbeat’ After Losing DeGods: Coral CEO
articles.description: Armani Ferrante reflects on the buzzy launch of Mad Lads, plus Coral’s larger plans with the Backpack app and versatile xNFTs.
